High Peak Marquee Tent Rentals

Elegant high peak marquee tents in 5 sizes for weddings, backyard parties, corporate events and festivals. Professional delivery, setup and takedown included throughout Burlington, Hamilton, Oakville, Grimsby, Niagara and the GTA.

💡 We also SELL tents! If you host regular events, buying may be more economical. View Tents for Sale →
Tent Rental Sizes & Prices

All tents are high peak marquee style — elegant, weather-resistant, and perfect for any outdoor event. Prices include delivery, setup and takedown.

For Rent

10×20 High Peak Tent

$350

Perfect for small backyard gatherings, birthday parties, market stalls and intimate celebrations.

  • Seats approx. 20–30 guests
  • High peak marquee style
  • Single peak design
  • Sidewalls available
  • Delivery, setup & takedown included
Book This Tent
For Rent

20×20 High Peak Tent

$450

Our most popular size — ideal for backyard parties, graduation events, bridal showers and small weddings.

  • Seats approx. 40–60 guests
  • High peak marquee style
  • Single peak design
  • Sidewalls available
  • Delivery, setup & takedown included
Book This Tent
For Rent

20×30 High Peak Tent

$550

Great for medium-sized weddings, corporate events and festivals. Generous space for dining, dancing and mingling.

  • Seats approx. 60–90 guests
  • High peak marquee style
  • Single peak design
  • Sidewalls available
  • Delivery, setup & takedown included
Book This Tent
For Rent

20×40 High Peak Tent

$750

Perfect for large weddings, grand celebrations, corporate functions and festivals with bigger guest counts.

  • Seats approx. 100–120 guests
  • High peak marquee style
  • Double peak design
  • Sidewalls available
  • Delivery, setup & takedown included
Book This Tent
For Rent

20×60 High Peak Tent

Contact for Pricing

Our largest and most impressive tent — featuring three dramatic high peaks. Ideal for large weddings, galas, festivals and major corporate events requiring maximum space and visual impact.

  • Seats approx. 150–200 guests
  • Three high peak marquee design
  • Maximum event coverage
  • Sidewalls available
  • Free site visit included
  • Delivery, setup & takedown included
